caption: A news segment from News18 India focuses on the politics of Bihar, featuring a split-screen layout. The central visual shows two men in white traditional Indian attire walking away from each other across a bridge, separated by a large scale that symbolizes "बिहार की राजनीति" (Politics of Bihar). The scale compares "उम्र 72 वर्ष" (Age 72 years) and "9वीं बार CM" (CM for the 9th time) on one side with "उम्र 34 वर्ष" (Age 34 years) and "पूर्व हिंदी CM" (Former Hindi CM) on the other. To the right, small profile photos of politicians including "विजेन्द्र यादव" and "संतोष सुमन" appear. The bottom ticker consistently reads "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश का वापस आना सुखद समाचार है". Across the frames, the top red headline changes from "नीतीश, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है" to "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" and finally "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला होगा?".
